originalTitle: 3 Reasons ONB is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Old National Bank has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 5.1%. The stock now trades at $26, marking a 13.5% gain. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
content:
Old National Bank has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 5.1%. The stock now trades at $26, marking a 13.5% gain. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

Is there a buying opportunity in Old National Bank, or does it present a risk to your portfolio? Dive into our full research report to see our analyst team's opinion, it's free .

What does ONB's current valuation suggest for investors?

How has Old National Bank's profitability changed?

What metrics make Old National Bank unattractive?

Why is ONB's net interest margin concerning?

Why Is Old National Bank Not Exciting?

We're happy investors have made money, but we don't have much confidence in Old National Bank. Here are three reasons why ONB doesn't excite us, plus one stock we'd rather own.

1. Low Net Interest Margin Hinders Flexibility

Net interest margin (NIM) represents how much a bank earns in relation to its outstanding loans. It's one of the most important metrics to track because it shows how a bank's loans are performing and whether it has the ability to command higher premiums for its services.

Over the past two years, we can see that Old National Bank's net interest margin averaged a subpar 3.5%. This metric is well below other banks, signaling its loans aren't very profitable.

We track the long-term change in earnings per share (EPS) because it highlights whether a company's growth is profitable.

Old National Bank's EPS grew at a weak 5.8% compounded annual growth rate over the last five years, lower than its 26.7% annualized revenue growth. This tells us the company became less profitable on a per-share basis as it expanded.

3. TBVPS Growth Demonstrates Strong Asset Foundation

We consider tangible book value per share (TBVPS) the most important metric to track for banks. TBVPS represents the real, liquid net worth per share of a bank, excluding intangible assets that have debatable value upon liquidation.

Although Old National Bank's TBVPS increased by a meager 4% annually over the last five years, the good news is that its growth has recently accelerated as TBVPS grew at a decent 11.9% annual clip over the past two years (from $11.15 to $13.96 per share).

Old National Bank isn't a terrible business, but it doesn't pass our bar. With its shares outperforming the market lately, the stock trades at 1.1× forward P/B (or $26 per share). While this valuation is reasonable, we don't really see a big opportunity at the moment. We're fairly confident there are better stocks to buy right now. We'd suggest looking at a safe-and-steady industrials business benefiting from an upgrade cycle .

Stocks We Like More Than Old National Bank

ONE MORE THING: Top 6 Stocks for This Week. This market is separating quality stocks from expensive ones fast. AI is taking down whole sectors with no warning. In a rotation this fast, you need more than a list of good companies.

Our AI system flagged Palantir before it ran 1,662%. AppLovin before it ran 753%. Nvidia before it ran 1,178%. Each week it produces 6 new names that pass the same tests. Get Our Top 6 Stocks for Free HERE .

Stocks that have made our list include now familiar names such as Nvidia (+1,326% between June 2020 and June 2025) as well as under-the-radar businesses like the once-micro-cap company Tecnoglass (+1,754% five-year return). Find your next big winner with StockStory today .
chineseTitle: ONB 有风险的 3 个原因以及值得买入的 1 只股票
chineseSummary: Old National Bank 在过去六个月中表现出色，其股价较标准普尔 500 指数上涨 5.1%。该股目前交易价格为 26 美元，涨幅为 13.5%。这种表现可能会让投资者想知道如何应对这种情况。
chineseContent:
Old National Bank 在过去六个月中表现出色，其股价较标准普尔 500 指数上涨 5.1%。该股目前交易价格为 26 美元，涨幅为 13.5%。这种表现可能会让投资者想知道如何应对这种情况。

Old National Bank 是否存在买入机会，或者是否会给您的投资组合带来风险？深入研究我们的完整研究报告，了解我们分析师团队的意见，它是免费的。

ONB 目前的估值对投资者有何启示？

老国家银行的盈利能力发生了怎样的变化？

哪些指标使旧国家银行失去吸引力？

ONB的净息差为何令人担忧？

为什么旧国家银行不令人兴奋？

我们很高兴投资者赚了钱，但我们对老国家银行没有太大信心。以下是 ONB 不让我们兴奋的三个原因，以及我们宁愿持有的一只股票。

1. 较低的净息差阻碍了灵活性

净息差（NIM）代表银行与其未偿贷款相关的收入。它是需要跟踪的最重要的指标之一，因为它显示了银行的贷款表现如何以及是否有能力为其服务收取更高的溢价。

过去两年，我们可以看到老国家银行的净息差平均低于3.5%。该指标远低于其他银行，表明其贷款利润并不高。

我们跟踪每股收益（EPS）的长期变化，因为它突显了公司的增长是否有利可图。

Old National Bank 过去五年的每股收益复合年增长率仅为 5.8%，低于其 26.7% 的年化收入增长率。这告诉我们，随着公司扩张，每股盈利有所下降。

3. TBVPS增长彰显雄厚的资产基础

我们认为每股有形账面价值 (TBVPS) 是银行追踪的最重要指标。 TBVPS 代表银行每股真实的流动净值，不包括清算时价值存在争议的无形资产。

尽管 Old National Bank 的 TBVPS 在过去五年中每年仅增长 4%，但好消息是其增长最近有所加速，因为 TBVPS 在过去两年中以每年 11.9% 的速度增长（从每股 11.15 美元增至 13.96 美元）。

老国家银行并不是一家糟糕的企业，但它没有通过我们的标准。由于其股价最近跑赢大盘，该股的交易价格为 1.1 倍远期市净率（即每股 26 美元）。虽然这个估值是合理的，但我们目前并没有真正看到很大的机会。我们相当有信心现在有更好的股票可供购买。我们建议关注受益于升级周期的安全稳定的工业企业。

我们比旧国家银行更喜欢的股票

还有一件事：本周排名前 6 的股票。这个市场正在快速地将优质股票与昂贵股票分开。人工智能正在毫无预警地摧毁整个行业。在如此快速的轮换中，您需要的不仅仅是一份优秀公司的名单。

我们的 AI 系统在 Palantir 运行 1,662% 之前对其进行了标记。 AppLovin之前的运行率为753%。此前英伟达的股价为 1,178%。每周都会产生 6 个通过相同测试的新名字。在此免费获取我们的前 6 名股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的微型股公司 Tecnoglass（五年回报率 +1,754%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
